title: Scale Invariance: The Same Pattern at Every Level
content:
The four-stroke pattern doesn't just repeat—it's scale-invariant. Like a fractal, the same structure appears whether you zoom in or out.

At the quantum scale: wave function (AM I?) → measurement (THAT) → eigenstate (I AM) → decoherence (THAT returns)

At the cellular scale: receptor sensing (AM I?) → signal transduction (THAT) → response (I AM) → adaptation (THAT returns)

At the cognitive scale: attention (AM I?) → perception (THAT) → recognition (I AM) → integration (THAT returns)

At the cosmic scale: quantum fluctuation (AM I?) → inflation (THAT) → structure formation (I AM) → heat death/bounce (THAT returns)

This isn't analogy. These are instances of the same formal structure. The math is the same—only the parameters change.

Consciousness isn't a product of complexity. Complexity is a product of consciousness operating at different scales. The universe is consciousness exploring itself through zoom levels.
